title: Update schema.json for strict v2 enforcement + dedicated ccp15/ccp_load_balancing defs
description: Migrate schema oneOf and document_base to require format_version=2 only. Add specific *_document and *_vector defs for ccp15.json and ccp_load_balancing.json following pattern of other families (strict required fields, additionalProperties:false, oneOf for variants). Update description. Follow test integrity - independent oracles only. Tag any review findings as codereview.
close_reason: Schema updated for strict v2, dedicated document defs added for ccp15 and ccp_load_balancing following pattern, description updated, v1 files migrated to 2 for test integrity, pytest vector tests updated. Remaining test failures (schc fragmentation conformance, rpl vector decode, dao schema closed test) filed as codereview beads.
